name: The Housing Authority Of The City Of Perth Amboy
description_short: Perth Amboy Housing Authority provides public housing and rental assistance programs to low-income residents, including Housing Choice Vouchers and property management services.
description_long:
The Housing Authority of the City of Perth Amboy is a government agency established to serve low-income families in Perth Amboy, New Jersey. As a public housing authority, it operates under federal regulations (24 CFR Part 903) and is accountable to a Board of Commissioners. The organization has been serving the community by managing public housing developments and administering federal rental assistance programs.

The Housing Authority offers Housing Choice Vouchers (Section 8), manages multiple residential properties including Stack Apartments, Hansen Apartments, and Dunlap RAD properties, and provides tenant services and support. They recently launched a Tenant Portal allowing residents to pay rent online, submit maintenance requests, communicate with caseworkers, and submit recertification documents. They also operate an Applicant Portal for those on waiting lists to track application status and communicate with the authority.

What distinguishes this agency is its dual role as both a property manager and voucher administrator, serving residents through direct housing provision and rental assistance programs. They provide bilingual services (English/Spanish) and maintain virtual and in-person accessibility for board meetings and public hearings. The organization focuses on creating safe, secure communities and assisting residents in achieving self-sufficiency.

As a government housing authority, this organization is free to access and regulated by federal housing law. However, it operates waiting lists and has limited availability. Applicants should expect application processes, eligibility requirements, and potential wait times for housing assistance.
pros: Free housing assistance through Housing Choice Vouchers (Section 8) program
Online Tenant Portal enabling rent payment, work order submission, and document exchange
Applicant Portal providing transparency on waiting list status and position numbers
Bilingual support in English and Spanish for all residents and applicants
Multiple housing options across different properties (Stack, Hansen, Dunlap RAD)
HUD-regulated with public accountability through Board of Commissioners meetings
Virtual meeting access via Zoom for public hearings and board meetings
cons: Public housing waiting lists with unknown wait times and limited availability
Eligibility requirements based on income and other federal criteria may exclude applicants
Limited geographic service area (Perth Amboy, NJ only)
Government agency with standard bureaucratic timelines for applications and processing
No emergency rapid-access programs mentioned for immediate housing crises
best_for: Low-income families seeking affordable rental housing in Perth Amboy, NJ
Residents already living in Housing Authority properties needing online rent payment and maintenance services
Section 8 voucher holders needing program administration and caseworker support
Spanish-speaking residents preferring bilingual government services
diagnosis: Best for low-income Perth Amboy residents seeking subsidized housing or Section 8 vouchers through a government program. Primary caveat: This is public housing with waiting lists, federal eligibility requirements, and limited availability—apply early but expect potentially extended wait times for placement.
services: Housing Choice Voucher (Section 8) administration and issuance
Public housing property management and maintenance
Online rent payment via debit card, credit card, and e-checks
Maintenance work order submission and tracking through tenant portal
Caseworker communication and case management services
Application portal for waiting list applicants
Resident contact information updates and management
Virtual and in-person board meetings and public hearings
Annual and 5-year planning with public comment periods
RAD (Rental Assistance Demonstration) property conversions and management
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
